title: To God, His Gift.
content:
As my little pot doth boil,
    We will keep this level-coil,
    That a wave and I will bring
    To my God a heave-offering.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To God, His Gift."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
